name: timewhere
description: IB 学生个人时间管理 Chrome 扩展

scripts.webdev:preview:acceptance: npm run webdev:preview:headers-smoke && npm run webdev:preview:smoke && npm run webdev:preview:core-smoke && npm run webdev:preview:ui-smoke && npm run webdev:preview:data-hygiene-smoke
scripts.webdev:acceptance:local: npm run webdev:verify && npm run webdev:ui:walkthrough && npm run webdev:desktop:smoke
scripts.test: node tests/scheduling.test.js && node tests/external-links.test.js && node tests/focus.test.js && node tests/calendar.test.js && node tests/taskboard.test.js && node tests/managebac.test.js && node tests/management-review.test.js && node tests/matrixview.test.js && node tests/reminders.test.js && node tests/daily-journal.test.js && node tests/google-sync.test.js && node tests/widget-snapshot.test.js && node tests/platform-boundary.test.js && node tests/baseline-safety.test.js && node tests/webdev-scaffold.test.js && node tests/webdev-migration-adapter.test.js && node tests/webdev-business-parity.test.js && node tests/webdev-offline-queue.test.js && node tests/webdev-integration.test.js
scripts.webdev:verify: npm run webdev:plan:check && npm run webdev:preview:preflight && node tests/webdev-scaffold.test.js && node tests/webdev-migration-adapter.test.js && node tests/webdev-business-parity.test.js && node tests/webdev-offline-queue.test.js && npm --prefix pages run build && npm --prefix workers run typecheck && node tests/webdev-integration.test.js
